models.name: Gemma-3n-E2B-it
models.description: A variant of [Gemma 3n E2B](https://ai.google.dev/gemma/docs/gemma-3n) ready for deployment on Android using [LiteRT-LM](https://github.com/google-ai-edge/LiteRT-LM/blob/main/kotlin/README.md). It supports text, vision, and audio input, with 4096 context length.

models.name: Gemma-3n-E4B-it
models.description: A variant of [Gemma 3n E4B](https://ai.google.dev/gemma/docs/gemma-3n) ready for deployment on Android using [LiteRT-LM](https://github.com/google-ai-edge/LiteRT-LM/blob/main/kotlin/README.md). It supports text, vision, and audio input, with 4096 context length.

models.name: Gemma3-1B-IT
models.description: A variant of [google/Gemma-3-1B-IT](https://huggingface.co/google/Gemma-3-1B-IT) with 4-bit quantization ready for deployment on Android using [LiteRT-LM](https://github.com/google-ai-edge/LiteRT-LM/blob/main/kotlin/README.md).

models.name: Gemma3-270M-IT
models.description: A variant of [google/gemma-3-270m-it](https://huggingface.co/google/gemma-3-270m-it) with 8-bit quantization. Ultra-lightweight at 290 MB, supports 140+ languages including German, French, and Italian.

models.name: Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct
models.description: A variant of [Qwen/Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct](https://huggingface.co/Qwen/Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct) ready for deployment on Android using [LiteRT-LM](https://github.com/google-ai-edge/LiteRT-LM/blob/main/kotlin/README.md).

models.name: Qwen3-0.6B
models.description: A variant of [Qwen/Qwen3-0.6B](https://huggingface.co/Qwen/Qwen3-0.6B) ready for deployment on Android using [LiteRT-LM](https://github.com/google-ai-edge/LiteRT-LM/blob/main/kotlin/README.md). Pre-trained on 36 trillion tokens across 119 languages including German, French, and Italian.

models.name: Qwen3.5-0.8B
models.description: A variant of [Qwen/Qwen3.5-0.8B](https://huggingface.co/Qwen/Qwen3.5-0.8B) with multimodal vision support, ready for deployment on Android using [LiteRT-LM](https://github.com/google-ai-edge/LiteRT-LM/blob/main/kotlin/README.md).

models.name: DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B
models.description: A variant of [deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B](https://huggingface.co/deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B) ready for deployment on Android using [LiteRT-LM](https://github.com/google-ai-edge/LiteRT-LM/blob/main/kotlin/README.md). Strong reasoning capability.

models.name: TinyGarden-270M
models.description: Fine-tuned Function Gemma 270M model for Tiny Garden.

models.name: MobileActions-270M
models.description: Fine-tuned Function Gemma 270M model for Mobile Actions.
